title: Home page configuration after login in monday.com
excerpt: When customer login to the monday.com account they need to see the consolidated dashboards by default. Is there any option to create this configuration to change the dashboards.

posts.author: Tanzeela (Tanzeela Qureshi)
posts.cookedHtml: When customer login to the monday.com account they need to see the consolidated dashboards by default. Is there any option to create this configuration to change the dashboards.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tanzeela,

At this time, you’re able to customise the default dashboard on the Enterprise plan:

Screen Shot 2023-07-13 at 3.09.23 pm720×406 20.5 KB

I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to customise this on our other plans. We encourage you to add your vote to the existing feature request
